title: AdsXFlow LTX-2.3 ComfyUI Worker
description: ComfyUI-based RunPod Serverless worker running Lightricks LTX-2.3 (22B audio-video) via Lightricks/ComfyUI-LTXVideo. Weights baked into the image (LTX-2.3 distilled fp8 + Gemma 3 12B + spatial upscaler). 32 GB GPU floor — runs on RTX 5090 / L40S / A100 / H100.

gpuTypeIds: NVIDIA RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell Server Edition
NVIDIA RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell Workstation Edition
